title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates
company: Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates:
Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jindal Steel & Power Asia Pacific Associates!
